predictions.description: The document opened back from disk yields the seeded text at /note/msg — save wrote real content, open parsed it.

save → open → stringify reproduces the source XML byte-for-byte (attribute preserved, no declaration added). This also witnesses the replaceExisting=true overwrite (step 4) since the reopen happens after it.

The buried missing-path open (final step) fails BEFORE touching the result variable — 'reopened' still holds the valid document (in-bot witness: msgValue/roundtripXml were read from it; this check pins that the failed open didn't clear it).
